chunks.text: So let's start with the first one.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The first one is what you just saw, MLP.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Multi-Layer Perceptron.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The simplest type of artificial neural network.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: In fact, till the rest came, these were synonyms.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Artificial neural network and MLPs were synonyms.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So MLPs is basically Multi-Layer Perceptron.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Where you have multiple perceptrons organized in layers.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So there is an input layer, there is an output layer,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: and then there are hidden layers.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So where does MLP come in handy?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: You can apply it in any machine learning problem.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Especially in supervised machine learning problem,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: regression or classification scenarios, MLPs perform very well.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Especially if you want to capture non-linear relationship,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: there MLPs are great.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: If you add hidden layers,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: you will be able to capture non-linear relationship better.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Why will you be able to do it? We will discuss it.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The second type of artificial neural network,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: which is very famous these days, is CNN.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Which stands for Convolutional Neural Network.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So Convolutional Neural Network is a special neural network,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: where you have at least one layer.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It is a convolutional layer.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Now what is a convolutional layer?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: You will have to study this a little bit

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: but I will just let you know that CNN is used a lot

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: in image processing and video processing applications.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: In fact, in today's date, all the major image processing applications,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: self-driving cars or I don't know,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: in healthcare, scanning the chest image to tell if there is cancer or not.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: In such applications, CNN is being used a lot.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So CNN is actually a great type of artificial neural network.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: There was this guy, Yan Li Kun.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: He is considered to be the father of CNN.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So you can read a little bit about him.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: I will again share the links.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The third type of neural network that we are going to discuss is RNN.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So RNN stands for Recurrent Neural Network.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And what is the specialty of this neural network?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Whatever neural networks we have discussed so far,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: MLPs and CNN,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: these are all feed-forward neural networks.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It means that the information goes from the first layer to the last layer linearly.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: But in RNN, what happens is that somewhere in the middle,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: in the hidden layer, the output of the hidden layer

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: is feedbacked and goes to some layer at the back

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: so that the prediction can be improved.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And there is a very good variation of this,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: it is called LSTM, Long Short Term Memory.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And both these things, RNN and LSTM,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: are used a lot in natural language processing based applications.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So if you interact with a chatbot like Google Now or Siri or Cortana,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: so internally they are using RNNs.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So again, it's a very famous kind of artificial neural network.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The next one is known as autoencoders.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So autoencoders to be honest are not as famous as CNN and RNN,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: but they have a very different application.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So what happens here is that the job of autoencoders is that

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: you have an input data,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: you want to compress it without losing the quality.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: If you have an image,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: you want to make it smaller without losing the quality.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Same goes with any kind of operation.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: You want to compress the file or you want to compress the video.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So the whole idea is that you want to compress without losing quality.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So what happens here is that your input layers and output layers have equal nodes,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: but your hidden layers have fewer nodes so that you can do this task.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So that was autoencoders.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The last one is my personal favorite and I have studied a lot about it.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It's known as GAN.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It stands for Generative Adversarial Network.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So what is GAN?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: GAN is this great concept.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So there is this guy called Ian Goodfellow and he is pretty young actually.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: He came up with this concept that we can do imagination.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Artificial Neural Networks.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And he created an architecture where two neural networks compete with each other.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So there is one neural network which is called generator.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And there is one more neural network which is called discriminator.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So what we want to do with our GAN is to generate images of completely new people.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: People who have never existed before.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So what we will do is we will generate photos of a lot of people from the generator.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And the task of the generator is to discriminate whether the photo is fake or real.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: As soon as the generator can fool the discriminator,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: you will tell that particular image that it's an auto-generated image.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: As in imagined image.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It was never there before.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And guess what guys, it's such a wonderful concept.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: In fact, look at this photo.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: In this photo, if you can see, it looks like they are real human beings,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: but actually none of them ever existed.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: These are all imagined faces.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And all this happened with GAN.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: With GAN, you can also generate music.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Or you can also generate stories.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So it's a beautiful concept in which you are getting your imagination done through your program.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So again, it's a beautiful concept.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: You should see some beauties on it.

chunks.text: So these are the top 5 types of neural networks.

chunks.text: So I will just summarize.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So the first one that we discussed was MLP.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Then we discussed CNN.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning

chunks.text: And it will add that pixel color

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And this thing is being used a lot now.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning

chunks.text: they are trying to add color

chunks.text: using this technique.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So, I don't know. If you like a movie

chunks.text: I will share a link

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And that is great.

chunks.text: Similarly, by showing

chunks.text: A tag for the movie.

chunks.text: There are many applications like this.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It is not very applicable in many areas.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: But these are very interesting use cases.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And I find it very interesting.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Next is text translation.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: there are some apps

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: which you can point directly to

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: a text written in a language

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: which you are not able to understand.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: They are able to translate it in real time.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: In fact, a lot of code in Google Translator

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Deep learning algorithm is being used

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: for this real time translation.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Not only that,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: you are pointing out on images as well.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: You are able to convert the text

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: in real time into some language

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: like English or Hindi or some other language.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And this is really really helpful

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: for travellers

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: across the world who are not able to understand

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: sign boards or bus numbers.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It is very easy for them.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: You point the camera and you get the translation

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: which is good.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The next one is very interesting.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: I still remember.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: There are some photos of my childhood

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: which I try to see now.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It is so blurry that I don't understand what is inside it.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And this new technique which I am telling you,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: In 2016, some researchers of Google Brain

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: started a project called Pixel Restoration.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Where they

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: gave a photo of very less pixel

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: and converted it into HD

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: to get the output.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So the value of the pixels around

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: is automatically calculated by this algorithm.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And it is converting your low quality photos

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: into high quality.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So if you have old photos or

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: very old albums in your house,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: you take their photo and put it in this application

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: and in turn it will return

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: a brand new kind of photo which is

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: looking good.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And this again is a great application.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Then there is

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: object detection and identification.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: If you have used Google Photos,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: then you would know that

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: what does Google Photos do?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It automatically arranges all your photos in folders.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So folder of your name, folder of your parents,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: folder of your pet, folder of your friends,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: folder of your college trip.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And it is happening automatically.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So the algorithm of Google Photos

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: is able to identify that object

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: and first it is able to detect that object

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: and then it is able to identify it.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And then it clusters it into one group.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And what is a very solid example of this?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: A few days back,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: I had a relative

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: who had a baby

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: and they used to take a lot of photos of it.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So for the first 1-2 years

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: when the baby was growing, they used to take a lot of photos of it.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: One fine day,

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: the mother got a notification

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: from Google Photos

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: that we have a surprise for you.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So a 2-minute video was played

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: where all the photos of the baby

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: were shown chronologically

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: by Google Photos.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And a text was written below

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: they grew up so fast with a smiley.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And all this was automatic.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It was not like people do it by adding it in Google.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It was that algorithm which automatically thought

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: that let's make our user feel special.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And it did it in a perfect way.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And that is insane, right?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Making the user feel so personal

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So I will always use Google Photos, right?

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Then there are GANs

chunks.text: Generative Adversarial Networks.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Using these, you can generate

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: new things. Like you can generate an image

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: like this. Meaning none of these

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: human beings actually existed.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: This is the wonder of a neural network

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: which automatically saw a lot of photos

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: and then started generating photos of new people.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: I don't know if you have ever used

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: such apps or not.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: If you give a photo of a couple

chunks.text: that app will be able to predict

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: how their baby will look.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: You must have seen a lot of such applications.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So they use GAN

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: as a Generative Adversarial Network.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: The best part of GAN is that it can

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: generate music by itself.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So you never know in the future

chunks.text: AI and generate AI

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: composition.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: And people in the future

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: won't be a fan of Badshaah or Honey Singh.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: They will be a fan of AI.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: Similarly, it can also generate handwriting.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: So if you show a lot of handwriting

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: it can generate the same handwriting.

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: It can also generate stories.

chunks.text: A few days ago I got a news that an AI

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning

chunks.title: Types of Neural Networks ｜ History of Deep Learning ｜ Applications of Deep Learning
chunks.text: There are so many things.

chunks.text: I will put this concept in the description.

chunks.text: Again, a stunning idea.

chunks.text: Apart from this, there are a lot of

chunks.text: Like in medical, there is work on drug research.

chunks.text: So there are so many things

chunks.text: that are being used in deep learning.

chunks.text: Every company's technical person is getting up,

chunks.text: And that is why in today's date
